title: T-039 — UI: TEC-022 BOM Edit modals (component add + version save)
prompt: Build BOM line editor modal (`bom_component_add_modal` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:192-243) used to add or modify a BOM line, plus `bom_version_save_modal` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:168-190 for save-as-new-version flow. Drag-sort component lives in T-038 tabs but the add/edit dialog is here. RED tests/ui/tec-022-bom-edit.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-022-bom-edit.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: BOM line add/edit modal + version save modal aligned with prototype dialogs.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use shadcn Dialog + Form. manufacturing_operation_name picker lists row_keys from reference_tables.manufacturing_operations.
acceptance_criteria: Given the component-add modal opens, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:192-243, then the field set, action button order, and shadcn primitives match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.

Given the version-save modal opens, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:168-190, then the field set and Save/Cancel button order match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified.
Given the user submits an invalid quantity (0), when validated, then inline error appears.
Given the modal saves successfully, when API returns 200, then modal closes and parent table refreshes.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + validation paths.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow saving without manufacturing_operation_name picked.
